allow: PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match "node|next" } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, CPU, StartTime | Format-Table)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3000,3001,3002,3003 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess, @{n='ProcessName';e={\(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).ProcessName}})
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -eq "node" -and $_.StartTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(-15\) } | Select-Object Id, StartTime, CPU | Format-Table)

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name = 'node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match "next|npm run dev|npx-cli" } | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Killing PID $\($_.ProcessId\): $\($_.CommandLine.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(80, $_.CommandLine.Length\)\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name = 'node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match "next|npm run dev|npx-cli" } | Select-Object ProcessId, @{n='Cmd';e={$_.CommandLine.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(60, $_.CommandLine.Length\)\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)
